title: Ukraine: Life Despite Everything (EADF2026)
synopsis: Behind the front lines, war inflicts a different kind of slow violence: 15-hour blackouts, constant air-raid sirens, and endless grief. Moving away from active combat, this intimate documentary explores the resilient home front where ordinary Ukrainians stubbornly rebuild their shattered lives. From a kindergarten teacher protecting children to a sculptor honoring fallen soldiers, the film captures a collective exhaustion paired with fierce resistance. It delivers a moving testament to human endurance, proving that in the face of absolute destruction, the simple act of living becomes the ultimate rebellion.

synopsis_lang.en: Behind the front lines, war inflicts a different kind of slow violence: 15-hour blackouts, constant air-raid sirens, and endless grief. Moving away from active combat, this intimate documentary explores the resilient home front where ordinary Ukrainians stubbornly rebuild their shattered lives. From a kindergarten teacher protecting children to a sculptor honoring fallen soldiers, the film captures a collective exhaustion paired with fierce resistance. It delivers a moving testament to human endurance, proving that in the face of absolute destruction, the simple act of living becomes the ultimate rebellion.
synopsis_lang.zh_hk: 戰火下的日常，是每日長達15小時的停電、隨時撕裂夜空的空襲警報，以及從前線源源不絕傳來的噩耗。法國攝影師將鏡頭退回炮火後方，直擊那裏更隱形卻更漫長的日常抗爭，穿梭於滿目瘡痍的城鎮：期盼孩子安全長大的幼兒園老師、拒絕讓陣亡士兵被遺忘的雕塑家，以及在廢墟中拯救受驚動物的保育員。在生離死別的集體疲憊與迷茫中，這群留在後方的人沒有放棄，依然保持對自由的渴望與保衛家園的決心，在絕望之中展示出烏克蘭人民的韌性與生命力。

subtitle: English
